narrative: npm led with 84% of weekly downloads. Top package: @ai-rpg-engine/modules (441 this week). Top gainer: @ai-rpg-engine/rumor-system (+791%; Δ182). Concentration: top 5 = 28.8%. Data is partial (degraded: npm) (6 packages used cached previous data).

narrativeLines.label: Registry Lead
narrativeLines.text: npm led with 84% of 6,693 weekly downloads followed by PyPI (16%).

narrativeLines.label: Concentration
narrativeLines.text: Top 5 packages account for 28.8% of weekly downloads. Downloads are well-distributed across the portfolio.

narrativeLines.label: Data Health
narrativeLines.text: Data is partial (degraded: npm) (6 packages used cached previous data).

recommendations.title: High portfolio concentration
recommendations.detail: Gini coefficient 0.82 indicates downloads are heavily concentrated in a few packages. Diversify promotion efforts across the portfolio.

recommendations.title: Heavy npm dependency
recommendations.detail: 84% of downloads come from npm. Consider cross-publishing to PyPI and NuGet to reduce single-registry risk.

recommendations.title: 7 packages gaining traction
recommendations.detail: @ai-rpg-engine/starter-cyberpunk, @ai-rpg-engine/starter-pirate, @ai-rpg-engine/campaign-memory show organic growth with download spikes. Capitalize with blog posts, social media, or conference talks.

recommendations.title: 10 packages predicted to grow
recommendations.detail: Statistical models predict >20% growth in the next 7 days for @ai-rpg-engine/content-schema, @ai-rpg-engine/character-profile, @ai-rpg-engine/equipment.

recommendations.title: 15 packages with repeated spikes
recommendations.detail: Multiple download spikes detected for @ai-rpg-engine/modules, @ai-rpg-engine/starter-zombie, @ai-rpg-engine/campaign-memory. Could indicate bot activity, viral posts, or dependency adoption.

actionableAdvice.title: 75 packages in critical health
actionableAdvice.detail: backpropagate, mcpt, tool-compass, polyglot-gpu, comfy-headless scored below 20/100.
actionableAdvice.action: Review these packages for broken installs, outdated dependencies, or missing documentation. Consider archiving if no longer maintained.

actionableAdvice.title: Portfolio concentration risk
actionableAdvice.detail: Gini coefficient 0.82 — downloads are concentrated in a few packages.
actionableAdvice.action: Promote underperforming packages in README badges, blog posts, and release notes of popular packages.

actionableAdvice.title: 84% of traffic from npm
actionableAdvice.detail: Single-registry dependency increases blast radius if npm has outages or policy changes.
actionableAdvice.action: Cross-publish key packages to PyPI (via wrapper) or NuGet. Add install instructions for all registries in READMEs.
